title: Transaction Currency Inheritance from Account
description: The system shall automatically assign the currency of the source account to each transaction record at the time of creation. The transaction's currency_code shall be stored as a non-null field on the TransactionEntity. For standard (same-currency) transactions, no currency selection UI is shown to the user — the currency is inherited implicitly.
acceptance_criteria: Every TransactionEntity row in the database has a non-null currency_code
The currency_code on a transaction row matches the currency_code of its parent account
No currency selector is shown in the standard expense/income entry UI
Historical transactions retain their original currency_code even if the account's currency were somehow changed (immutability guard)
